samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Relay', a payroll platform for hiring contractors in 90+ countries. Audience: heads of finance at startups. Must include: hero with headline and primary CTA, a three-step how-it-works section, a country coverage grid, pricing with two tiers, a compliance trust strip, and a final CTA band.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Basel" — Swiss international minimal

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: pure white #FFFFFF. No alternate section tints; separate sections with rules, not color.
- Ink: near-black #111111. Secondary text: #5A5A5A.
- Accent: signal red #E10600, used only for the primary CTA, key numbers, and hover underlines.
- Rules and borders: 1px solid #111111 (full-strength black, not gray).
- Never: gradients, shadows, pastels, more than these three colors.

## Typography
- Everything in one neo-grotesque sans stack: Helvetica, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, system-ui, sans-serif.
- Headings: weight 700, tight leading (1.02), letter-spacing -0.02em. Hero h1 72-96px, oversized and left-aligned.
- Body 16px, line-height 1.5. Small labels 12px uppercase, letter-spacing 0.1em.
- Sentence case for headings; uppercase reserved for labels and the nav.

## Layout and spacing
- Exposed 12-column grid, max-width 1200px, 32px gutters. Asymmetric layouts encouraged: text in columns 1-5, supporting figures in 7-12.
- Section padding 112px vertical. Horizontal 1px black rules span the full grid between sections.
- Flush-left, ragged-right text. No centered sections.

## Components
- Buttons: sharp rectangles (0 radius), 14px 28px padding. Primary: red background, white text. Secondary: 1px black border, transparent.
- Cards: no boxes — use the grid and rules instead. Where a card is unavoidable: 1px black border, 0 radius, 24px padding, no shadow.
- Tables and stat blocks: numerals oversized (48px+), labels small uppercase underneath.
- Nav: wordmark left, links right, 1px black bottom rule.
- Footer: white with a heavy 4px black top rule.

## Tone
Objective, engineered, confident. The page should feel like a well-set poster: type and grid do all the work. Never decorative.

samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Voidrunner', a retro arcade roguelite launching on Steam. Moody but playful. Must include: hero with key art placeholder and wishlist CTA, a gameplay features section, a screenshots strip, a short lore teaser, and a system requirements table.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "CRT" — phosphor arcade terminal

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: near-black #0A0A0F. Panel background: #111119.
- Primary text: phosphor green #33FF66. Secondary text: dim green #1E9C4A.
- Accents: magenta #FF3DA6 (CTAs, highlights) and cyan #29D9FF (links, secondary glow).
- Borders: 2px solid #33FF66; important frames use double borders.
- Scanlines: overlay sections with a subtle repeating-linear-gradient (2px dark lines at low opacity).
- Never: white backgrounds, pastels, soft gray text.

## Typography
- Everything monospace: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace.
- Headings: uppercase, letter-spacing 0.06em, weight 700. Hero h1 48-64px with a text-shadow glow in the same hue (0 0 12px, low opacity).
- Body 15-16px, line-height 1.7. Prefix section labels with terminal markers like "> " or "[ ]".
- Blinking cursor motif (CSS animation) allowed once, in the hero.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1080px, centered. Section padding 80px vertical.
- Sections framed like terminal windows: bordered boxes with a title bar row.
- Dense is fine; this system tolerates more per viewport than most.

## Components
- Buttons: rectangular, 2px solid magenta border, transparent background, magenta text; on hover invert (magenta background, black text). Bracket the label: [ WISHLIST NOW ].
- Cards: bordered green boxes with 8-bit corner ticks; no radius, no soft shadow — use hard 4px offset shadows in dim green.
- Imagery placeholders: pixel-grid patterns or ASCII-art blocks built from CSS/inline SVG.
- Tables: green hairline grid, header row inverted (green background, black text).
- Nav: terminal status bar — wordmark as a prompt (user@voidrunner:~$), links as commands.

## Tone
Retro-futurist, arcade-cabinet cool. Winks at the player without breaking the fiction. Every element should feel like it renders on a curved glass tube.

samples.instructions: I need a landing page for 'Sobremesa', a modern Spanish tapas restaurant in Chicago. It should have a hero with warm ambiance imagery placeholder, a menu highlights section organized by small plates and large plates, a short chef story, hours and location with a map placeholder, and a reservation CTA.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Mediterraneo" — sun-warmed taverna

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: warm cream #FBF3E4. Alternate band: sun-washed #F3E5CB.
- Ink: espresso #2B2620. Secondary: #7A6A55.
- Accents: clay terracotta #C2532B (CTAs, prices) and olive #6B7436 (labels, secondary highlights).
- Dark band (footer only): espresso #2B2620 with cream text.
- Borders: 1px solid #E3D3B4.

## Typography
- Headings: serif — Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; weight 400, line-height 1.15. Hero h1 56-68px. Italic serif for dish names and pull quotes.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16-17px, line-height 1.65.
- Eyebrow labels: 13px uppercase olive, letter-spacing 0.12em.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1080px, 24px padding, section padding 96px.
- Menu sections set in two columns with dotted leader lines between dish and price.
- Imagery framed in arches: border-radius 999px 999px 0 0 on tall placeholder blocks.

## Components
- Buttons: soft rectangles (8px radius), terracotta background, cream text; hover deepens to #A8431F.
- Cards: cream #FFF9EC, 1px #E3D3B4 border, 12px radius, minimal shadow.
- Dividers: short centered flourishes — a 48px wavy line in olive (inline SVG).
- Placeholder imagery: warm gradient blends of terracotta, olive, and ochre #D9A441.
- Nav: transparent on cream, wordmark in serif italic, links right.

## Tone
Convivial, familial, unhurried — a long lunch that turns into evening. Rustic warmth with contemporary restraint; never a corporate template.

samples.instructions: Design a landing page for 'Meridian & Co', a heritage Swiss watchmaker founded in 1887. Must include: a hero with a single hero product shot placeholder, a heritage timeline with four milestones, three collection pieces with prices, a craftsmanship section, and a CTA to book a private boutique appointment.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Maison" — art-deco noir luxury

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: near-black #0E0D0B throughout. Slightly lifted panel: #171511.
- Text: warm ivory #F5EFE3. Secondary: #A79B84.
- Accent: champagne gold #C9A96A — hairlines, numerals, one word per heading at most. Hover: brighter gold #E0C285.
- Borders: 1px solid #3A352B; ceremonial frames use 1px gold.
- Never: bright colors, gradients, white backgrounds, more than one accent.

## Typography
- Headings: high-contrast serif — 'Didot', 'Bodoni MT', Georgia, serif; weight 400, generous size, line-height 1.05. Hero h1 64-80px.
- Eyebrows: 11px uppercase gold, letter-spacing 0.35em — wide and ceremonial.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 15px, line-height 1.8, ivory at 90% opacity.
- Numerals (years, prices): serif, gold, oversized.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1160px. Vast whitespace: section padding 140px vertical.
- Strict symmetry: centered headings, centered content. This system is formal.
- Deco geometry: thin gold rules with a small centered diamond glyph divide sections.

## Components
- Buttons: sharp rectangles, 1px gold border, transparent, gold uppercase letterspaced text; hover fills gold with black text. One button per viewport.
- Cards: panel background #171511, 1px #3A352B border, 0 radius, 48px padding.
- Timeline: a vertical gold hairline with diamond markers; years in oversized serif.
- Placeholder imagery: radial charcoal-to-black gradients suggesting a spotlight on velvet.
- Nav: sparse — wordmark centered or left, two links, hairline bottom rule.

## Tone
Hushed, exact, unhurried. Copy is spare and declarative; no exclamation, no discount language. Luxury communicated through restraint and space.

samples.instructions: Homepage for 'Rewild', a nonprofit restoring degraded farmland into native forest and meadow. Must include: an emotional hero, impact stat counters (acres restored, native species returned, volunteers), a three-step explanation of the restoration method, one featured project story, a donation CTA with three suggested amounts, and a newsletter signup.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Understory" — organic earthen warmth

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: warm linen #F4F1E8. Alternate band: pale moss #E9EBDD.
- Ink: deep forest #1E3D2B. Secondary: #6B6F5C.
- Accents: moss #5C7C4C (labels, links), sun ochre #D9A441 (donate CTA only), soil #7A5C3E (supporting).
- Dark band (one, for impact stats): forest #1E3D2B with linen text.
- Borders: 1px solid #DDD8C6.

## Typography
- Headings: humanist serif — Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; weight 500, line-height 1.2. Hero h1 52-64px.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 17px, line-height 1.7.
- Stats: serif numerals 56-72px in ochre on the dark band.
- Eyebrows: 13px uppercase moss, letter-spacing 0.1em.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1120px, section padding 100px. Asymmetric organic rhythm: alternate image-left / image-right.
- Section edges: soft curved dividers (large border-radius on band tops, 48px+), never hard horizontal cuts.

## Components
- Buttons: rounded 12px, ochre background with forest text for donate; outlined forest for everything else.
- Cards: linen #FBF9F1, 1px border, 16px radius, 32px padding, shadow at most 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.05).
- Impact counters: number + small caps label, divided by thin soil-colored rules.
- Placeholder imagery: layered gradient blends of moss, soil, and ochre; leaf silhouettes as inline SVG.
- Nav: transparent on linen, moss link underlines on hover.

## Tone
Grounded, hopeful, evidence-first. Warm but never saccharine; the land does the talking, numbers back it up.

samples.instructions: Build a landing page for 'Doodlewhale', a drawing app for kids aged 4 to 8. Big, bright, and friendly. Must include: hero with a playful mascot placeholder, three feature blurbs written for kids, a separate section for parents covering safety and no-ads promises, testimonials from two parents, and app store download CTAs.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Crayon" — big rounded playtime

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: soft paper #FFF9EC. Alternate bands rotate: sky tint #E3F2FF, mint tint #E4F8EC.
- Ink: friendly charcoal #3A3A3A (never pure black).
- Core crayon palette: blue #2E7CF6, sunshine #FFC93C, bubblegum #FF6FA5, grass #4CC26B. Rotate accents per section; CTAs always bubblegum.
- Borders: chunky 3px solid in the ink color.

## Typography
- Everything in a rounded sans stack: ui-rounded, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Comic Sans MS', system-ui, sans-serif.
- Headings: weight 800, line-height 1.1. Hero h1 56-72px, one keyword highlighted with a hand-drawn underline squiggle (inline SVG).
- Body 18px minimum, line-height 1.6 — parents read aloud, kids read along.
- Sentence case everywhere; exclamation points welcome, all-caps never.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1040px, centered, section padding 88px.
- Nothing sits flat: cards and images get a gentle rotation (-2deg to 2deg).
- Blob shapes: decorate section corners with large soft blobs (irregular border-radius like 60% 40% 55% 45%).

## Components
- Buttons: fat pills (999px radius), 18px 36px padding, weight 800, bubblegum background, white text, hard offset shadow 4px 4px 0 in ink.
- Cards: white, 3px ink border, 24px radius, hard offset shadow 6px 6px 0 in the section accent.
- Feature icons: chunky inline SVG doodles, 64px, stroked 3px in ink and filled with a crayon color.
- The parents section switches to a calmer look: white band, smaller type, blue accent only.
- Nav: wordmark with a whale doodle, one pill CTA right.

## Tone
Gleeful, encouraging, safe. Sounds like a kind kindergarten teacher: short sentences, concrete words. The parents section drops the play and earns trust plainly.

samples.instructions: Marketing page for 'Hexpatch', a CLI tool that makes database schema migrations safe with automatic rollback plans. Developer audience. Must include: hero with a terminal demo placeholder, an install command block, three feature highlights, a before/after comparison against hand-written migrations, and links to docs and GitHub.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Slate console" — dark developer docs

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: dark slate #0F172A. Panels: #1E293B.
- Text: #E2E8F0. Secondary: #94A3B8.
- Accent: cyan #22D3EE (CTAs, links, command highlights). Warning accent: amber #F59E0B, sparingly.
- Success/diff green #34D399 and removal red #F87171 exist only inside code and diff blocks.
- Borders: 1px solid #334155.
- Never: pure black, blue-purple gradients, glassmorphism.

## Typography
- Headings: monospace — ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; weight 600. Hero h1 44-56px (mono runs wide; keep sizes moderate).
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16px, line-height 1.7.
- Code: same mono stack, 14-15px, on #0B1120 blocks.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1120px, section padding 88px. Content leans left; right column holds terminal panels.
- Terminal-first: the hero demo panel is the largest element on the page, larger than the headline.

## Components
- Buttons: 8px radius, 12px 24px. Primary: cyan background, slate-900 text. Secondary: 1px #334155 border, transparent.
- Terminal panels: #0B1120 background, 12px radius, title bar with three dots, mono content; a copy button on command blocks.
- Cards: panel background, 1px border, 12px radius, 28px padding, no shadow.
- Comparison: two-column diff-style panel — left tinted with removal red at 8% opacity, right with diff green at 8%.
- Nav: slate with 1px bottom border; GitHub link gets a star-count pill.

## Tone
Precise, dry, zero marketing fluff. Write like a good README: claims are concrete, every promise demonstrated in the terminal.

samples.instructions: One-pager for 'Stillpoint', a small yoga and breathwork studio. Quiet and spacious. Must include: hero with a calming abstract visual, the weekly class schedule as a simple table, three practice styles explained briefly, a short introduction of the two founding instructors, and a first-class-free CTA.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Exhale" — airy pastel stillness

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: mist #F6F4F9. Alternate band: warm fog #F1EDE7.
- Ink: soft charcoal #3A3633. Secondary: stone #8B8680.
- Accents: sage #A8BCA1 and lavender #C3B5E3 — tints and thin outlines only, never loud fills.
- Borders: 1px solid #E5E0D8.
- Never: saturated colors, dark bands, hard black.

## Typography
- Headings: light serif — Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; weight 400, line-height 1.3, generous letter-spacing 0.01em. Hero h1 44-56px — deliberately modest.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 17px, line-height 1.9.
- Eyebrows: 12px lowercase italic serif in stone — soft, not shouty.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 960px — narrower than usual. Section padding 128px vertical: emptiness is the aesthetic.
- One idea per viewport. Centered, symmetric, slow.
- Circle motif: imagery and decorative elements are perfect circles or soft ellipses.

## Components
- Buttons: ghost pills — 999px radius, 1px charcoal border, transparent, charcoal text; hover fills sage at 20% opacity. No solid buttons anywhere.
- Cards: none if possible; prefer open space with thin rules. If needed: white at 60% opacity, 20px radius, no border, no shadow.
- Schedule table: hairline rows, serif class names, stone-colored times; no zebra striping.
- Placeholder imagery: large soft radial gradients (sage into lavender into mist), like light through frosted glass.
- Nav: nearly invisible — small wordmark, two links, no border.

## Tone
Quiet, spacious, kind. Short sentences with room around them. The page should lower the reader's pulse; nothing urges or sells hard.

samples.instructions: Subscription page for 'The Ledger Review', a daily finance briefing read by 80,000 subscribers. Must include: a masthead-style hero with an email capture, a sample of a recent briefing, three coverage areas, two subscription tiers (free and premium), and a short section on the editorial team.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Broadsheet" — newspaper print

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: paper #FAF8F2. No alternate tints — use rules to divide.
- Ink: #191919. Secondary: #5C5C57.
- Accent: oxblood #8C1D18 — links, the premium tier, small caps section labels. Nothing else is colored.
- Rules: 1px solid #191919; the masthead sits between a 3px double rule above and 1px below.
- Never: rounded corners, shadows, colored backgrounds, sans-serif headlines.

## Typography
- Headlines: serif — Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; weight 700, line-height 1.1, tight. Masthead wordmark 64-80px; article heads 28-36px.
- Body: same serif at 17px, line-height 1.65 — this system is serif throughout.
- Bylines and datelines: 13px small caps, letter-spacing 0.08em, secondary color.
- Drop cap on the first paragraph of the sample briefing: 3-line serif initial.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1120px. Multi-column: the briefing sample runs in two text columns with a 1px vertical rule between (column-rule).
- Section padding 72px — denser than a marketing page; this is an editorial page.
- Everything hangs from a strict baseline: no rotation, no overlap, no decoration.

## Components
- Buttons: rectangular, ink background with paper text; premium CTA in oxblood. 0 radius, 12px 28px padding.
- Email capture: single underlined input (border-bottom 1px ink only) with an ink button — like a classified coupon.
- Tier table: side-by-side columns divided by a 1px rule; premium column header in oxblood small caps.
- Pull quotes: 24px serif italic with oxblood left rule.
- Nav: a thin dateline bar above the masthead — edition date left, links right, 11px small caps.

## Tone
Authoritative, terse, wry. Financial-press cadence: short declarative sentences, numbers over adjectives, headlines that inform rather than tease.

samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Kepler Dynamics', which builds electric propulsion thrusters for small satellites. Audience: aerospace program managers. Must include: hero with product render placeholder, a technical specifications table, a flight heritage timeline, a partner logo strip, and a contact-sales CTA. Keep marketing language minimal; data first.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Blueprint" — aerospace technical

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: deep space navy #0B1B33. Panel: #102642.
- Blueprint grid: cover section backgrounds with a faint 24px grid of #16325C lines.
- Text: #EAF2FF. Secondary: #8FA5C4.
- Accent: signal orange #FF7A29 — CTAs, plotted data points, key spec values.
- Borders: 1px solid #1E3A5F.
- Never: gradients, rounded-friendly shapes, playful color.

## Typography
- Headings: condensed sans — 'Avenir Next Condensed', 'Arial Narrow', system-ui, sans-serif; weight 600, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.04em. Hero h1 48-60px.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16px, line-height 1.6.
- All figures, part numbers, and spec values in mono: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace, orange for key values.
- Annotation labels: 11px mono uppercase with leader lines, like a technical drawing callout.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1200px, section padding 96px.
- Angular: cards and buttons get one clipped corner (clip-path, 12px notch) instead of border-radius.
- Crosshair/reticle marks (thin + glyphs) decorate section corners.

## Components
- Buttons: clipped-corner rectangles, orange background with navy text for primary; 1px #8FA5C4 border transparent for secondary. Uppercase mono labels.
- Spec table: the centerpiece — mono values, hairline #1E3A5F grid, orange highlights on headline figures; caption row citing test conditions.
- Timeline: horizontal rail with mission markers, mono dates, orange node for the most recent flight.
- Cards: panel background, 1px border, clipped corner, 28px padding.
- Placeholder imagery: wireframe-style inline SVG line drawings in #4A6B96 on the grid background.

## Tone
Engineering confidence. Declarative sentences, SI units, no superlatives without a number attached. The page should read like a datasheet that happens to be beautiful.

samples.instructions: Make a one-page site for 'Curbside', an independent skateboard deck brand run out of a garage in Portland. Loud and raw. Must include: hero, a lineup of four deck designs with prices, a team riders section, an upcoming drop calendar, and a shop CTA. It should feel like a zine, not a store.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Xerox" — brutalist zine

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: raw newsprint #F2F2F0. Some sections invert to full black #0D0D0D with newsprint text.
- Ink: #0D0D0D. No gentle secondary gray — secondary text is just smaller ink.
- Accent: caution yellow #F5D90A — highlighter strips behind key words, price tags, the shop CTA.
- Borders: brutal 4px solid ink.
- Never: gradients, pastels, tasteful minimalism, soft anything.

## Typography
- Headings: condensed and enormous — 'Arial Narrow', 'Avenir Next Condensed', Impact, system-ui, sans-serif; weight 900, uppercase, line-height 0.9, letter-spacing -0.01em. Hero h1 96-140px, allowed to overflow and clip.
- Body: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace, 15px, line-height 1.5 — typewriter paragraphs.
- Highlight treatment: yellow background strip on key phrases, slightly rotated.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1240px but intentionally uneven: elements rotate (-3deg to 3deg), overlap, and break the grid.
- Section padding varies 48-96px — inconsistency is the system.
- Marquee strips: full-width repeating uppercase text bands (deck names, drop dates) between sections, alternating ink-on-yellow and newsprint-on-ink.

## Components
- Buttons: 4px ink border, 0 radius, uppercase condensed labels, hard shadow 6px 6px 0 ink; primary fills yellow.
- Deck cards: tall rectangles with 4px borders, taped-on labels (small rotated ink tabs), mono price stickers in yellow.
- Rider profiles: photocopy-style duotone placeholder blocks (ink on newsprint) with stapled-note captions.
- Calendar: a plain mono table with 4px outer border; sold-out rows struck through.
- Nav: a strip of ink with newsprint uppercase links; the cart link circled by a rough hand-drawn ellipse (inline SVG).

## Tone
Loud, irreverent, anti-corporate. Copy is short, all attitude — like it was typed fast and photocopied at midnight. Perfection is off-brand; slight misalignment is correct.

samples.instructions: Create a landing page for 'Parseform', an API that turns messy documents (invoices, receipts, contracts) into structured JSON. Developer-and-founder audience. Must include: hero with a live request/response code example, an accuracy stats row, three integration logos placeholders, usage-based pricing with a calculator teaser, and a start-free CTA.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Prism" — vivid gradient SaaS

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: white #FFFFFF. Alternate section: cool tint #F5F7FF.
- Ink: #0F1222. Secondary: #5B6178.
- Signature gradient: electric indigo #5B5BF7 through violet #A855F7 to cyan #22D3EE — used on the primary CTA, hero keyword text (background-clip), stat numerals, and one thin top border per card.
- Dark panels for code: #0F1222 with syntax accents in the gradient hues.
- Borders: 1px solid #E4E7F2.

## Typography
- Headings: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; weight 700, tight -0.02em. Hero h1 60-72px with the key phrase in gradient text.
- Body: same sans, 17px, line-height 1.65.
- Code: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace, 14px, in dark panels with indigo/cyan/violet syntax highlights.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1160px, section padding 104px.
- Hero is split: headline and CTA left, request/response code panel right, slightly overlapping the section below.
- Floating accents: two large, very soft gradient orbs (blurred radial gradients at low opacity) behind hero and pricing — decoration, never behind body text.

## Components
- Buttons: 12px radius, 14px 28px. Primary: the signature gradient with white text and a subtle colored shadow (0 8px 24px rgba(91,91,247,0.25)). Secondary: 1px border, ink text.
- Cards: white, 1px border, 16px radius, 32px padding, hover lift (0 12px 32px rgba(15,18,34,0.08)); a 3px gradient top border on featured cards.
- Stats row: gradient numerals 48-64px with plain secondary labels.
- Code panels: dark, 16px radius, tab bar (request | response), mono content.
- Nav: white with 1px border, primary CTA as a small gradient pill.

## Tone
Fast, confident, modern. Developer-credible but founder-friendly: every claim paired with a number, every feature shown in code.

samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Ever & Elm', a boutique wedding planning studio. Elegant and calm. Must include: hero, three service packages with starting prices, a gallery of real weddings with six image placeholders, a five-step planning process timeline, and an inquiry CTA with a short form.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Champagne" — romantic editorial blush

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: blush #FBF0EC. Alternate band: champagne #F5E9DA.
- Ink: deep plum #4A3640. Secondary: mauve #9A8089.
- Accent: dusty rose #C98A7D — CTAs, package names, fine details. Hover: deeper rose #B06E5F.
- Borders: 1px solid #E9D8CE; ceremonial dividers are 1px with a tiny centered diamond.
- Never: bright saturated color, dark tech aesthetics, heavy black.

## Typography
- Headings: refined serif — Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; weight 400, line-height 1.2. Hero h1 56-68px with one word in italic.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16px, line-height 1.75.
- Eyebrows: 12px uppercase dusty rose, letter-spacing 0.25em — wide and delicate.
- Numerals in the process timeline: oversized serif italic.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1080px, section padding 112px. Centered, symmetric, gracious.
- Gallery: uneven editorial grid — mixed tall and square frames with generous 24px gaps.
- Imagery frames: soft arches (border-radius 200px 200px 12px 12px) or ovals; thin 1px inner border inset like a mat.

## Components
- Buttons: slim pills, 1px plum border, transparent with plum text; primary fills dusty rose with blush text. 10px 28px padding — dainty, not chunky.
- Package cards: champagne background, 1px border, 4px radius, 40px padding; package name in serif italic, price in small caps.
- Timeline: vertical hairline with numbered serif markers and short justified descriptions.
- Form inputs: underline-only (1px plum bottom border), generous 16px text, floating labels in mauve.
- Placeholder imagery: soft gradient blends of blush, champagne, and rose — like out-of-focus florals.

## Tone
Warm, assured, quietly celebratory. Speaks to couples like a trusted friend with impeccable taste; never salesy, never twee.

samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Tidal', a custom surfboard shaper on the Central Coast. Retro and sun-soaked. Must include: hero, three board models with specs (length, volume, best conditions), a section on the custom shaping process, a short shaper bio, and an order CTA.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Endless Summer" — retro 70s coastal

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: sun-bleached cream #FFF6E5. Alternate band: sand #F4E4C6.
- Ink: deep navy #1D3557. Secondary: faded denim #5B7089.
- Accents: sunset coral #FF7E5F (CTAs, highlights) and ocean teal #1F8A8C (labels, links). Support: dune #E8C99B.
- Sunset stripe motif: stacked 8px bands of coral, dune, teal used as section dividers and card top-trims.
- Borders: 2px solid navy.

## Typography
- Headings: chunky slab feel — 'Rockwell', 'Courier Bold', Georgia, serif; weight 700, line-height 1.1. Hero h1 60-76px with a slight arc if possible (or gentle per-letter offset), navy with coral shadow offset 3px 3px 0.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16-17px, line-height 1.65.
- Eyebrows: 13px uppercase teal, letter-spacing 0.15em.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1100px, section padding 96px.
- Wavy dividers: sections separated by smooth wave curves (inline SVG), not straight lines.
- Badge/roundel: a circular emblem (inline SVG — wordmark around a wave) floats in the hero and footer.

## Components
- Buttons: pill radius, 2px navy border, coral fill with cream text; hover deepens coral. Slight -1deg rotation on the primary CTA.
- Board cards: cream with 2px navy border, 20px radius, sunset-stripe trim on top; specs in a small mono table (ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace).
- Process steps: numbered circles in teal with hand-level short copy.
- Placeholder imagery: horizontal gradient sunsets (coral to dune to teal) with a navy horizon line.
- Nav: cream, navy links, roundel as the mark.

## Tone
Laid-back, warm, craftsmanlike. First-person voice from the shaper; salt-air nostalgia without kitsch. Sounds like advice from someone who has shaped 3,000 boards.

samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Harcourt & Sloane', a boutique law firm advising founders on M&A and venture financings. Understated and credible. Must include: hero, four practice areas, a selected transactions list (six entries with deal sizes), brief partner profiles for three partners, and a contact section. No marketing hype.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Chambers" — discreet professional

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: alabaster #F7F6F3. No alternate tint except one navy band.
- Ink: charcoal #23282D. Secondary: #6E7278.
- Primary: deep navy #1B2A4A — headings, buttons, the single dark band (selected transactions).
- Accent: bronze #9C7A3C — hairline details, small caps labels, hover states. Use sparingly; two or three appearances per page.
- Borders: 1px solid #E1DFD8; formal dividers are double hairlines (1px, 3px gap, 1px).

## Typography
- Headings: traditional serif — Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; weight 500, modest sizes — hero h1 40-48px. Restraint over spectacle.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16px, line-height 1.7, comfortable measure (65ch max).
- Labels: 12px small caps bronze, letter-spacing 0.12em.
- Transaction amounts: serif, navy on the dark band in alabaster.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1040px, section padding 88px. Calm single-column rhythm with occasional two-column splits.
- Strictly rectilinear: 0 radius everywhere, no rotation, no overlap, no decoration beyond rules.

## Components
- Buttons: rectangles, navy background, alabaster text, 12px 28px; secondary is a bronze-underlined text link, not a button.
- Practice area items: numbered list (01-04) with serif headings and one-sentence descriptions; thin rules between.
- Transactions: a formal table on the navy band — parties, year, deal size — alabaster text, bronze rules.
- Partner profiles: small square portrait placeholders (neutral gradient), name in serif, credentials in one line.
- Nav: wordmark in serif, three links, 1px bottom rule; no CTA button in the nav.

## Tone
Measured, exact, quietly senior. Every sentence would survive a partner review: no superlatives, no exclamation, facts and matters handled. Credibility through omission.

samples.instructions: Promo page for 'Basswood', a three-day folk and bluegrass festival on a farm outside Nashville, June 12-14. Must include: hero with dates and place, the lineup split into headliners and supporting acts, three ticket tiers, a camping and getting-there info section, and an FAQ with four questions.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Hootenanny" — handmade folk poster

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: cream #FBF4E2. Alternate bands: mustard #E3A72F and forest #2F4A32 (light text on forest).
- Ink: deep brown #3B2E1E.
- Accents: barn red #A3402F (CTAs, headliner names) and forest #2F4A32.
- Borders: 2px solid brown; poster frames use a double border with 6px gap.
- Sunburst motif: radiating thin brown lines (inline SVG) behind the hero title and section badges.

## Typography
- Display: stacked mixed type like a letterpress poster — alternate lines of heavy slab ('Rockwell', Georgia, serif; weight 700) and condensed uppercase ('Arial Narrow', 'Avenir Next Condensed', sans-serif). Hero builds the festival name + dates as a type-stack poster, 64-96px.
- Body: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif, 16-17px, line-height 1.65.
- Lineup names: slab, headliners 32-40px in barn red, supporting acts 18px brown in a tidy multi-column list.
- Labels: 13px uppercase letterpressed feel, letter-spacing 0.18em.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1080px, section padding 88px.
- Poster logic: centered type-stacks, badge shapes (scalloped circles, ribbon banners as inline SVG) for section headers.
- Edges: scalloped or ticket-perforation borders (dashed 2px) on key blocks.

## Components
- Buttons: rectangles with 4px radius, barn red fill, cream text, 2px brown border and 3px 3px 0 brown shadow.
- Ticket tiers: three ticket-shaped cards (perforated dashed edge, punched circle notches), tier name in slab, price oversized.
- Info rows: icon-free — small ribbon labels instead; directions in plain serif with a hand-drawn arrow SVG.
- FAQ: plain details/summary rows with 2px brown top rules and slab questions.
- Nav: cream strip, brown links, a small sunburst mark left.

## Tone
Handmade, warm, communal. Copy sounds like a neighbor who plays banjo: plainspoken, hospitable, a little wry. Machine-perfect polish is off-key; sturdy and friendly is right.

samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Northstar Pediatrics', a modern pediatric clinic with same-week appointments. Reassuring for parents. Must include: hero with a book-appointment CTA, four services (well visits, sick visits, vaccinations, telehealth), a meet-the-doctors section with three providers, an accepted insurance strip, and clinic hours with location.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Bandage" — friendly clinical care

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: clean white-blue #FDFEFF. Alternate band: pale sky #EBF4FD.
- Ink: deep navy #17395C. Secondary: #5D7591.
- Primary accent: sky blue #58A6E8 (CTAs, links). Support accents: warm coral #F27D72 (highlights, one per section max) and mint #7ED6C0 (checkmarks, positive tags).
- Borders: 1px solid #DCE8F4.
- Never: alarm red, dark bands, clinical gray-on-gray.

## Typography
- Headings: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; weight 700, line-height 1.2. Hero h1 48-60px.
- Body: same sans, 18px, line-height 1.7 — larger than typical for stressed parents reading fast.
- Labels: 13px uppercase sky, letter-spacing 0.08em.
- Accessibility: contrast AA minimum everywhere; never place text on mid-tone blue.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1120px, section padding 96px, generous and orderly; no rotation, no overlap.
- Soft geometry: everything rounded 16-20px; decorative quarter-circle shapes in pale sky tuck into section corners.

## Components
- Buttons: pills, 999px radius, 14px 30px, sky fill with white text; hover deepens to #3E8BD0. Secondary: 1px navy border.
- Service cards: white, 1px border, 20px radius, 32px padding, pictogram-style inline SVG icon (2.5px stroke, sky with one coral detail), soft shadow 0 2px 8px rgba(23,57,92,0.06).
- Provider cards: circular portrait placeholders (soft sky gradient), name, credentials line, and a mint "accepting new patients" tag where relevant.
- Insurance strip: pale sky band with grayscale placeholder logos in rounded white chips.
- Hours/location: a two-column card with a map placeholder (soft gradient with a coral pin SVG).

## Tone
Reassuring, plain, competent. Say it the way a good nurse would: clear steps, no jargon, warmth without baby talk. Parents should feel the clinic has room for them this week.

samples.instructions: Landing page for 'Featherlite', an open-source UI framework that ships in under 2kb gzipped. Must include: hero with the size claim front and center, an install code snippet, a component list, a benchmark comparison against two heavier frameworks, and a GitHub CTA. The page itself should feel as light as the library.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Paperweight" — radical featherweight minimal

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: #FCFCFC. That is the only background — no bands, no tints, no panels.
- Ink: #222222. Secondary: #8A8A8A.
- Accent: chartreuse #84CC16 — exactly three uses per page: the size badge, the primary CTA, and benchmark bars. Nowhere else.
- Borders: hairline 1px #EAEAEA.
- Never: shadows, gradients, background colors, decorative shapes, images of any kind.

## Typography
- Headings: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; weight 600, modest sizes — hero h1 36-44px. The restraint is the statement.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16px, line-height 1.7, max measure 60ch.
- Code: same mono, 14px, hairline-bordered blocks on the page background (no dark panels — too heavy).
- Labels: 12px mono in secondary gray.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 720px, single column, left-aligned — a document, not a brochure.
- Section padding 64px; separate sections with a single hairline rule.
- Whitespace and alignment are the only decoration permitted.

## Components
- Buttons: text-first — mono label with a 1px border, 2px radius, 8px 16px padding; primary gets the chartreuse border and text. No fills.
- Size badge: a small mono chip next to the h1 — 1px chartreuse border, chartreuse text: 1.9kb gzipped.
- Component list: a plain two-column mono list with hairline row rules; no cards.
- Benchmarks: horizontal CSS bars — chartreuse for Featherlite, gray #D9D9D9 for the others — with mono value labels; no chart junk.
- Nav: wordmark in mono, two text links, hairline bottom rule.

## Tone
Dry, exact, quietly smug. Every byte justified, every sentence load-bearing; the design proves the pitch by refusing all weight.

samples.instructions: Exhibition page for 'Machina', a special exhibition on 200 years of robots at a science museum, running October through March. Must include: hero, three exhibit zones described, visitor information (hours, prices, accessibility), a school groups section, and a ticket CTA.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Bauhaus" — geometric primary boldness

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: gallery white #F5F3EF.
- Ink: #121212.
- The three primaries carry the page: red #D93025, blue #1A56C4, yellow #F2B705. Assign one primary per exhibit zone and keep it consistent for that zone everywhere.
- Rules: 3px solid black — thick and structural.
- Never: gradients, pastels, more colors than these, decorative curves.

## Typography
- Headings: geometric sans — 'Futura', 'Century Gothic', system-ui, sans-serif; weight 700, line-height 1.0. Hero h1 80-110px, tight, some words set vertically (writing-mode) for poster energy.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16px, line-height 1.6.
- Labels: 12px uppercase, letter-spacing 0.2em, on small colored tabs.
- Numbers (dates, prices): oversized geometric, often inside circles.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1200px, section padding 96px.
- Hard asymmetric grid: big blocks of color, off-center compositions, deliberate imbalance held by black rules.
- Pure geometry decorates: circles, half-circles, triangles, and squares in the three primaries — placed structurally, not scattered.

## Components
- Buttons: rectangles, black fill with white text; hover swaps to the section primary. 0 radius, 14px 32px, uppercase.
- Zone blocks: each zone is a large color field (its primary) with black display type and one geometric shape; white body text on blue and red, black on yellow.
- Visitor info: a black-ruled table, icon-free, with circled numerals.
- Ticket CTA: a huge circle button (160px+) in red with white uppercase text — the most Bauhaus element on the page.
- Nav: white, black 3px bottom rule, wordmark in geometric caps; a small red square as the mark.

## Tone
Bold, curatorial, exact. Museum-poster confidence: short declarative lines, dates and facts writ large. The page is itself an exhibit of form follows function.

samples.instructions: App landing page for 'Nomad Rail', an app for planning multi-country European train trips — syncing itineraries, splitting costs, and voting on stops with your group. Must include: hero, three feature highlights, a sample seven-day route teaser (Paris to Vienna), two traveler quotes, and app download CTAs.
samples.design_system:
# Design system: "Grand Tour" — vintage travel poster deco

The brief decides the content and structure of the page; this system decides how everything looks. Apply it regardless of subject matter.

## Color
- Page background: aged cream #F4E9D3. Alternate band: deep rail teal #175E63 with cream text.
- Ink: dark slate-teal #21313A. Secondary: #6E7B76.
- Accents: coral #E2725B (CTAs, route line highlights) and brass #C8A24B (frames, small details).
- Borders: 1px solid #DFCFAF; poster frames are double rules in brass.
- Never: neon, gradients-as-decoration, generic flat corporate blue.

## Typography
- Headings: deco serif — Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; weight 700, letter-spacing 0.05em, some headings uppercase with wide tracking. Hero h1 56-72px.
- Body: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif, 16-17px, line-height 1.65.
- Eyebrows: 12px uppercase brass, letter-spacing 0.3em.
- Route names and times: ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace — like a departures board.

## Layout and spacing
- Max-width 1120px, section padding 100px.
- Poster framing: the hero sits inside a double brass rule frame with deco corner glyphs (inline SVG).
- Route motif: a dotted coral line with small circle station nodes threads between sections, connecting hero to route teaser.

## Components
- Buttons: slightly rounded rectangles (6px), coral fill, cream text, thin brass outer offset border; uppercase letterspaced labels.
- Feature cards: cream, 1px border, 8px radius, a small deco sunray crest (inline SVG) atop each.
- Route teaser: a luggage-tag styled panel on the teal band — day-by-day stops as a mono departures list, cities in serif caps, dotted leaders.
- Quotes: framed like vintage postcards — cream cards, brass stamp corner square, italic serif text, a mono dateline.
- Nav: cream, slate-teal links, wordmark in deco caps with a small locomotive glyph.

## Tone
Wanderlust with old-world polish. Evokes the golden age of rail — romantic, assured, precise about practicalities (dates, times, costs) the way a good conductor is.
